chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-807 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of MA-5871/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025. Mr. Khalid Mustafa Shoro, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. M/s. Jaleel Ahmed Memon and Syed Jan Muhammad Bukhari, Advocates for respondent No.3. Mr. Syed Hyder Hassan Shah, Advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G. = The case of the petitioner is that he was an employee of BISE Larkana as Assistant Secretary BPS-17 and was transferred to BISE Shaheed Benazirabad vide Notification dated 24.12.2019. Petitioner joined his service there and he was promoted to the post of Deputy Secretary BPS-18 vide Notification dated 26.10.2025. The Petitioner is aggrieved by the Notification dated 05.05.2023 whereby he was repatriated to BISE Larkana by the Secretary to Government of Sindh, Universities & Boards Department, Karachi, where despite of his promotion as Deputy Secretary BPS-18 he worked as Assistant Secretary in BPS-17. We have heard learned Counsel for the parties and perused the record. After arguing the matter at some length the parties have consented that the impugned order dated 05.05.2023 may be set aside and the petitioner may be allowed to serve his duty at BISE Shaheed Benazirabad where the Board may conduct an inquiry into his promotion within a period of 02 months. This proposal is not opposed by learned Counsel for the petitioner. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of and the Notification dated 05.05.2023 is hereby set aside. Petitioner shall join his duty at BISE Shaheed Benazirabad where he will be paid past and future salaries and that the Board shall be at liberty to determine the status of the promotion of the petitioner by providing him an opportunity of hearing strictly in accordance with law and

Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of and the Notification dated 05.05.2023 is hereby set aside. Petitioner shall join his duty at BISE Shaheed Benazirabad where he will be paid past and future salaries and that the Board shall be at liberty to determine the status of the promotion of the petitioner by providing him an opportunity of hearing strictly in accordance with law and rules preferably within a period of two months’ time from today. The petitioner and the respondents shall be at liberty to avail the appropriate remedy in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid

The petitioner and the respondents shall be at liberty to avail the appropriate remedy in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-1871 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of MA-7660/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025. Mr. Syed Ahmed Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shamsuddin Rajpar, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G alongwith Muhammad Saleh Bhatti, Superintendent, Mines & Mineral Department Hyderabad, DPS Shah Nawaz Jokhio and SIP Sajjad Jamali SHO P.S Jamshoro. = Pursuant to process Mr. Muhammad Arshad Pathan, Advocate files Vakalatnama alongwith application under Order 1 Rule 10 of CPC on behalf of applicant/intervener, taken on record. He undertakes to provide copy of the same to learned Counsel for petitioner. The statements filed by respondents No.6 and 7 are also taken on record. Learned Counsel for applicant/intervener submits that lands involved in this case are belonging to applicant Wazir Muhammad / the petitioner in C.P.No.D-1946 of 2025 and the petitioner herein in order to defeat the interest of said essential party has not made him party to the proceedings. He, therefore, by filing application under Order 1 Rule 10 of CPC prays for issuing notices. Record supports his contention. Mr. Syed Ahmed Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner waives notice and also claims copy of the petition filed by the petitioner/intervener, which is undertaken to be provided by Mr. Muhammad Arshad Pathan, Advocate during course of the day. To come up on 13.11.2025 at 11:00 a.m. Till then interim order passed earlier to continue JUDGE JUDGE Shahid

To come up on 13.11.2025 at 11:00 a.m. Till then interim order passed earlier to continue JUDGE JUDGE Shahid ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-1946 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on MA-8038/2025 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on MA-8039/2025 4. For orders on MA-8040/20205 5. For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan Advocate for petitioner. = 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. Notice to the respondents as well as Additional A.G Sindh. To come up on 13.11.2025 at 11:00 a.m. alongwith C.P.No.D-1871 of 2025 JUDGE JUDGE Shahid

Notice to the respondents as well as Additional A.G Sindh. To come up on 13.11.2025 at 11:00 a.m. alongwith C.P.No.D-1871 of 2025 JUDGE JUDGE Shahid ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-585 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA-2465/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025. Mr. Akash Ali Rind, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G. = Mr. Haider Ali Maheri, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, taken on record. He seeks time for preparation. To come up on 25.11.2025. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid

To come up on 25.11.2025. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-1467 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025. Mr. Chetan S. Kella, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, Advocate for respondents/NADRA. = At the very outset learned Counsel for respondents/NADRA undertakes that if the petitioner approaches their office alongwith in-laws of her deceased husband then they will issue CNIC to her according to the Family Tree as per SOP. At his undertaking the petition stands disposed of. The petitioner shall approach the respondents/NADRA accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid

The petitioner shall approach the respondents/NADRA accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-595 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA-2538/2025 3. For hearing of main case. 30.10.2025. Mr. Gulab Khan Qaimkhani, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G. = Learned AAG seeks time for filing of the comments. At his request, the matter is adjourned to 11.11.2025. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid
